ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "route_id" TEXT /* Reference to the route of the flight */,
  "departure_delay" REAL /* Delay in departure of the flight */,
  "arrival_delay" REAL /* Delay in arrival of the flight */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time of the flight */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time of the flight */,
  "avg_ticket_price" REAL /* Average ticket price of the flight */,
  "total_fare" REAL /* Total fare collected for the flight */,
  "flight_month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "flight_year" INTEGER /* Year of the flight */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Status of the flight (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flight cancellation if applicable */,
  "boarding_gate" TEXT /* Boarding gate number */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* Origin airport of the route */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* Destination airport of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the flight */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of the route (e.g., domestic, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_routes_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the aircraft */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "aircraft_status" TEXT /* Status of the aircraft (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "runways" INTEGER /* Number of runways at the airport */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* Number of terminals at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Departure date of the flight */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Arrival date of the flight */,
  "estimated_departure" TEXT /* Estimated departure time of the flight */,
  "estimated_arrival" TEXT /* Estimated arrival time of the flight */,
  "schedule_status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., on-time, delayed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, airline staff, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" TEXT /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
